# HANGOVR 180

> HANGOVR 180 is a dietary supplement made by Next Level Brands Inc. of Austin, Texas. Each single-serve sachet holds three capsules: dihydromyricetin (DHM) 1500 mg, S-acetyl glutathione 75 mg, and fulvic acid 150 mg. It is taken before drinking. Patent pending (US Application 18/698,010).

HANGOVR 180 is a dietary supplement — not an alcoholic beverage and not a drinking-promotion brand. The company publishes the research basis for its ingredients openly; those pages are listed below. HANGOVR 180 makes no claim to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

FDA disclaimer: These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Science

- [The Science](https://hangovr180.com/science/): Evidence basis for HANGOVR 180's ingredients — DHM, S-acetyl glutathione, and fulvic acid — with citations to published literature, including NIH/PMC-indexed sources. Authored by Mark Scott.

## Product

- [What's Inside](https://hangovr180.com/inside.html): Full ingredient list and dosages.
- [Do a 180](https://hangovr180.com/doa180.html): How HANGOVR 180 is used.
- [Tomorrow People](https://hangovr180.com/whos-in.html): Who HANGOVR 180 is for.
